hooks.command: bash -c 'git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current)" && git status --short || echo "Warning: not a git repository"'
bash -c 'if git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1 && git diff --name-only | grep -qE "\.(ts|tsx)$"; then npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20; fi'
